title: JClans
description: JClans - simple clan system for your minecraft server.
body:
## JClan - simple clan system for your minecraft server. 

This plugin will allow you to support player associations on your server. 

Each clan has its own chat available by the command "/c <message>" and a prefix that you can output using %clan_prefix% (But you need an installed PlaceholderAPI).

You can store data about all clans using a MySQL or SQLite database.

There is support for Russian and English.

NEED LUCKPERMS TO WORK!

![JClans big logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0cac19ac8d908b4e5ff1eacb2fd65d14acb5d738.png)
